candidate_definition_hints.text: Self-host the powerful Dia TTS model. This server offers a user-friendly Web UI, flexible API endpoints (incl. OpenAI compatible), support for SafeTensors/BF16, voice cloning, dialogue generation, and GPU/CPU execution.

**Self-host the powerful [Nari Labs Dia TTS models](https://github.com/nari-labs/dia) — including the original **Dia 1.6B** and the new **Dia 2** family (1B & 2B) — with this enhanced FastAPI server! Features hot-swappable model switching, an intuitive Web UI, flexible API endpo…

source_repo_description: Self-host the powerful Dia TTS model. This server offers a user-friendly Web UI, flexible API endpoints (incl. OpenAI compatible), support for SafeTensors/BF16, voice cloning, dialogue generation, and GPU/CPU execution.
